name: Gold Coin
description:
Currency traded on Palpagos Island.
Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

name: Animal Skin
description: Animal Skin

name: Arrow
description: An Arrow for use with a bow.

name: Poison Arrow
description:
Arrows for shooting with Bow_Poison and BowGun_Poison.
It poisons any target it hits.

name: Fire Arrow
description:
Arrows for shooting with Bow_Fire and BowGun_Fire.
Deals COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire damage.

name: Assault Rifle
description:
Mows down enemies with overwhelming force.
It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes.

name: Stone Axe
description:
An axe for cutting wood.
Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

name: Metal Axe
description:
An axe for cutting wood.
Made from metal, its sharpness has improved.

name: Refined Metal Axe
description:
An axe for cutting wood.
Made from high quality metal, its sharpness has improved even further.

name: Axe4
description: Axe4

name: Metal Detector
description:
Holding it allows you to detect hidden ores nearby.
It marks the metal when close to the ore, but the mark disappears if you move away.

name: Wooden Club
description:
A Bat for close range combat.
Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

name: Bat
description:
Baseball bat for close-range combat.
Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.

name: Meat Cleaver
description:
Knife for butchering Pals.
When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher.
Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

name: Stun Baton
description:
Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact.
Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted.

name: Red Berries
description:
A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked.
They can be found anywhere on the island.

name: Baked Berries
description:
Cooking enhances their nutritional value,
and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

name: Crossbow
description:
Fires an Arrow effortlessly.
Though it takes time to load, it delivers a powerful shot.

name: Charcoal
description:
Charcoal made from burning Wood.
It can be combined with Sulfur to create Gunpowder2.

name: Claw
description: Claw

name: Cloth
description:
Cloth woven from Wool. 
Required to create armor.

name: High Quality Cloth
description:
Cloth2 woven from a large amount of Wool. 
Required to create high quality armor.

name: Cloth Outfit
description:
Clothes made from Cloth.
Protects against cold nights.

name: Coal
description:
Coal often found in caves and other places.
Required to create high quality metal.

name: Metal Armor
description:
Armor made of metal.
Somewhat heavy, but provides good defense.

name: Metal Helm
description:
A helm made of metal.
A reliable piece of armor that protects your head, and all the thoughts within.

name: Ingot
description:
A material required to create metal weapons and armor.
Refined from CopperOre using a furnace.

name: Ore
description:
Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace.
Can be found in caves and other places.
There are rumors of Pals capable of detecting ore.

name: Double-Barreled Shotgun
description:
Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading.
Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch.

name: Rocket Ammo
description: Ammo for the Launcher_Default and other similar weapons.

name: Fang
description: Fang

name: Fiber
description:
Fiber collected from trees.
A material used when creating bows, etc.

name: Pelt Armor
description:
Armor made from Leather.
Its warmth and defense have been improved.

name: Feathered Hair Band
description:
A beautiful feathered headband.
Though improbable, it somehow seems to protect its wearer from lethal head injuries.

name: Grilled Meat
description:
Grilled meat.
A full stomach leads to smiling faces.

name: Gunpowder
description: Gunpowder

name: Gunpowder
description:
Gunpowder2 used to fire ammunition.
Required to make bullets.

name: Handgun
description:
A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities.
Has more immediate firepower than a MakeshiftHandgun.

name: Decal Gun 1
description:
Strange gun that paints a picture of PinkCat where it is fired.
Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

name: Decal Gun 2
description:
Strange gun that paints a picture of SheepBall where it is fired.
Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

name: Decal Gun 3
description:
Strange gun that paints a picture of Alpaca where it is fired.
Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

name: Decal Gun 4
description:
Strange gun that paints a picture of Anubis where it is fired.
Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

name: Decal Gun 5
description:
Strange gun that paints a picture of LazyDragon where it is fired.
Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

name: Low Grade Medical Supplies
description:
Herbs good for Sick, Sprain, and Overfull.
They don't heal Health when eaten, however.

name: Medical Supplies
description:
Strange Medicines that are effective at treating COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_GastricUlcer and COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_Fracture.
Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

name: High Grade Medical Supplies
description:
LuxuryMedicines that are effective at treating COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_Weakness and COMMON_CONDITION_NAME_DepressionSprain.
Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

name: Mind Control Meds
description:
MindControlDrug that are extremely effective in controlling dissidents.
Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

name: Beautiful Flower
description:
A plant that blooms colorful flowers.
Can be used to make Opium and Narcotic.

name: Suspicious Juice
description:
Juice that improves mood when consumed.
Drinking it increases work speed for a period of time,
but lowers SAN.

name: Strange Juice
description:
Juice that greatly improves mood when consumed.
Drinking it significantly increases work speed for a period of time,
but significantly lowers SAN.

name: Memory Wiping Medicine
description:
A potion that allows the player to reset their status points when consumed.
It has no effect if consumed by a Pal.

name: Homing Sphere Launcher
description:
A launcher for firing spheres.
Fired spheres home in on Pals.

name: Refined Metal Armor
description:
Armor made from high quality metal.
Quite heavy, but provides excellent defense.

name: Refined Metal Helm
description:
A helm made from high quality metal.
The luster from the polished metal gives the wearer that added boost of confidence.

name: Refined Ingot
description:
A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor.
Refined from CopperOre and Coal using a furnace.

name: Energy Cartridge
description: Ammo used by the LaserRifle and similar weapons.

name: Laser Rifle
description:
A weapon that fires high-energy lasers.
It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle.

name: Rocket Launcher
description:
A Launcher_Default 
that can fire a powerful round from long distances.

name: Leather
description:
Leather taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material.
It can be obtained from certain Pals.

name: Nail
description:
Necessary for building various facilities.
Can be made with a WorkBench.

name: Circuit Board
description:
Required to create precision equipment.
Can be made with a Factory_Hard_02.

name: Pal Sphere
description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

name: Mega Sphere
description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.

name: Giga Sphere
description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.

name: Hyper Sphere
description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.

name: Ultra Sphere
description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design.

name: Legendary Sphere
description:
An item that captures Pals when thrown.
Very few Pals can escape its perfected design.

name: Radar Sphere
description:
A sphere that captures Pals when thrown.
Though it has a low chance of success,
it can forcibly capture another person’s Pal.

name: Pal Sphere
description: en Text

name: Bread
description:
Pan made from baked Flour.
A tasty staple food.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description:
A pickaxe used for mining.
Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.

name: Metal Pickaxe
description:
A pickaxe used for mining.
Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved.

name: Refined Metal Pickaxe
description:
A pickaxe used for mining.
Its durability and efficiency have further improved.

name: Pump-Action Shotgun
description:
A high capacity, powerful shotgun.
It has outstanding close range DPS.

name: Single-Shot Rifle
description:
A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load.
What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power.

name: Decal Ink
description:
Ammo for Decal Guns.
Uses ink to paint a picture of a Pal.

name: Handgun Ammo
description: Ammo for HandGun_Default and other similar weapons.

name: Rifle Ammo
description: Ammo for SingleShotRifle and other similar weapons.

name: Shotgun Shell
description: Ammo for shotguns and other similar weapons.

name: Coarse Ammo
description: Ammo for Musket, MakeshiftHandgun, and other similar weapons.

name: Machine Gun Ammo
description: Ammo for Machingun and other similar weapons.

name: Assault Rifle Ammo
description: Ammo for AssaultRifle_Default1 and other similar weapons.

name: Magnum Ammo
description: Ammo for Magnum and other similar weapons.

name: Scatter Sphere Launcher
description:
A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres.
It can easily capture a herd of Pals.

name: Single-Shot Sphere Launcher
description:
A launcher that fires spheres.
It can capture Pals fom a greater distance.

name: Pal Metal Armor
description:
Armor made from StealIngot.
High defense, but extremely heavy.
Equipment for a hero, it exudes bravery.

name: Pal Metal Helm
description:
A helm made from StealIngot.
Envied for its immaculate quality, it is proof of a chosen warrior.

name: Pal Metal Ingot
description:
Material required to create weapons and armor using Pal Metal.
Made stronger by creating an alloy from metal and Paldium.

name: Stone
description:
Material for structures and items.
Can be obtained by mining rocks.

name: Paldium Fragment
description:
Crystallized energy from the World Tree.
Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

name: Paldium Clump
description: Crystals of PAL crystal

name: Dung
description:
Animal dung.
An essential part of any ecosystem, and can even be used as fertilizer.
It smells awful, to say the least.

name: Huge Dung
description:
It has an intimidating presence.
Whether it's the scent or the shape, this is the mark of a heavyweight.

name: Sword
description:
Sword for close-range combat.
The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure.
Requires WeaponFactory_Dirty_01 to craft.

name: Frag Grenade
description:
A FragGrenade useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

name: Incendiary Grenade
description:
A FragGrenade_Fire useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.

name: Shock Grenade
description:
A FragGrenade_Elec useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.

name: Ice Grenade
description:
A FragGrenade_Ice useful for mid-range combat.
It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.

name: Tomato
description:
A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish.
Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.

name: Old Bow
description:
Primitive long range weapon.
Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

name: Poison Bow
description:
Frightening bow that poisons its target.
Poisoned Pals are easier to capture.
Requires Arrow_Poison.

name: Fire Bow
description:
A bow that deals COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire damage.
Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture.
Requires Arrow_Fire.

name: Poison Arrow Crossbow
description:
A BowGun that inflicts poison on its target.
Poisoned Pals are easier to capture.
Requires Arrow_Poison.

name: Fire Arrow Crossbow
description:
A BowGun that deals COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Fire damage.
Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture.
Requires Arrow_Fire.

name: Three Shot Bow
description:
An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously.
By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

name: Five Shot Bow
description:
An enhanced bow that allows five arrows to be fired simultaneously.
By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

name: Berry Seeds
description:
Seeds that produce Berries.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be obtained when picking Berries.

name: PotatoSeedPotatoes
description: PotatoSeedPotatoes

name: Tomato Seeds
description:
Seeds that produce Tomato.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

name: Lettuce Seeds
description:
Seeds that produce Lettuce.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

name: Wheat Seeds
description:
Seeds that produce Wheat.
Necessary for starting a farm.
Can be purchased from a merchant.

name: Wheat
description:
An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes.
Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

name: Flour
description:
Flour made from grinding Wheat.
It can be used as an ingredient in making Pan.

name: Wood
description:
Material for structures and items.
Can be obtained by cutting trees.

name: Wool
description:
Material sheared from sheep Pals.
A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.

name: Crude Oil
description:
A material that can be processed into various products.
Obtained by installing a OilPump in an oil field.

name: Plasteel
description:
Plastic created by processing CrudeOil and metal.
Can be produced in a BlastFurnace3.

name: Computer
description: Computer

name: Lettuce
description:
A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must.
It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

name: Grape
description: Grape

name: Hop
description: Hop

name: Egg
description:
Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals.
ChickenPal produce them.

name: Milk
description:
Drink it as is, or use it in various meals.
Can be milked from CowPal.

name: Hot Milk
description:
Even more delicious when warmed up.
Great for keeping hunger away.

name: Jam-Filled Bun
description:
Pan with jam spread on it.
The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

name: Potage
description: Potage

name: Salad
description:
A Salad made by mixing Lettuce and Tomato.
Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.

name: Omelet
description:
A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup.
Eating it improves COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by +10% for a period of time.

name: Stir-Fried Veggies
description: A dish prepared by stir frying Lettuce and Meat. When eaten, it will temporarily increase COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by +10%.

name: Hot Dog
description: A culinary dinner sandwiching a sausage in an Pan. Consumption leads to an improved sense of fullness for a specific period.

name: Pancake
description:
A dish made by mixing Flour and Milk together then baking.
Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

name: Marinated Mushrooms
description:
A dish made by marinating Mushrooms in a marinade.
Eating it improves COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by +10% for a period of time.

name: Mushroom Soup
description:
Cream soup made of Mushrooms.
Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

name: Curry
description: Curry

name: Carbonara
description:
A dish mixing pasta with Egg and Milk.
Eating it makes it improves COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by +20% for a period of time.

name: BLT
description: A dish where bacon, Lettuce, Tomato are sandwiched in Pan. Consumption increases COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by +15% for a while.

name: Cheeseburger
description: A meal made with a Hamburger with cheese squeezed between it. Upon consumption, it increases the satiety level for a certain period as well as COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE +10%.

name: Pizza
description:
A dish made by piling Berries, Tomato and cheese on Pan.
Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

name: Bolognese Sauce
description: A pasta dish combined with meat sauce. Eating it makes it difficult for sanity to decrease and provides COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK +10% for a while.

name: Cake
description:
A dish that is eaten during celebrations.
Put it in the chest at your breeding farm to have a Pal lay a particularly healthy egg.

name: Mushroom Stew
description: A stew made with Mushroom. Consumption elevates work speed and offers COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK +10% for a particular duration.

name: Sandwich
description: Sandwich

name: Corn Soup
description: Corn Soup

name: Stew
description: Stew

name: Hamburger
description: A dish where a hamburger, Lettuce the Tomato are contained in the Pan. When eaten, it boosts one's stomach fullness and COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by +10% for a while.

name: Grilled Fish
description: Grilled Fish

name: Seafood Soup
description: Seafood Soup

A glider for soaring through the air.

name: Lifmunk's Submachine Gun
description:

name: Direhowl's Saddled Harness

name: Chikipi Poultry
description:
ChickenPal meat.
Light and easy to eat,
it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

name: Lamball Mutton
description:
SheepBall meat.
Red meat with a unique flavor.
Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

name: Raw Kelpsea
description:
Kelpie meat.
Tender and slightly sweet.
Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

name: Galeclaw Poultry
description:
Eagle meat.
Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

name: Rushoar Pork
description:
Boar meat.
Full of the delicious flavors of wild game.
Juicy and nutritious.

name: Raw Dumud
description:
LazyCatfish meat.
Fatty with a rich taste.
Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

name: Eikthyrdeer Venison
description:
Deer meat.
Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

name: Reindrix Venison
description:
IceDeer meat.
Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures.
Takes a very long time to spoil.

name: Caprity Meat
description:
BerryGoat meat.
Healthy and full of nutrients.
Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

name: Mozzarina Meat
description:
CowPal meat.
Thick, juicy and marbled.
Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

name: Broncherry Meat
description:
SakuraSaurus meat.
Giant meat full of massive stores of energy.
Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

name: Mammorest Meat
description:
GrassMammoth meat.
With massive size comes massive flavor.
Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

name: Grilled Chikipi
description:
Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire.
Light and refreshing on the tongue.

name: Lamball Kebab
description:
Spiced and roasted mutton.
Deeply complex with unique flavors.

name: Grilled Kelpsea
description:
Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire.
Plump and juicy.

name: Grilled Galeclaw
description: Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

name: Roast Rushoar
description:
Boar grilled over a hearty flame.
Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside.
Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

name: Broiled Dumud
description:
Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce.
Soothes both mind and body.
Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

name: Roast Eikthyrdeer
description:
Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes,
accented by the aromas of the deep forest.
Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

name: Roast Reindrix
description:
When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature.
This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time,
making it a perfect emergency ration.

name: Herb Roasted Caprity
description:
Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of
herbs and berries embedded in the meat.
Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

name: Mozzarina Steak
description:
Thick, well-done steak.
Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

name: Broncherry Rib Roast
description:
Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds.
Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone,
making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

name: Mammorest Steak
description:
Boasts a rich and dignified flavor.
Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

name: Chikipi Sauté
description:
Plump poultry sautéed in butter.
Accented with fresh lemons.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed for a period of time.

name: Herb Roasted Lamball
description:
Indulging in an abundance of fresh berries
creates a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton.
Eating it will increase COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by +10% for a period of time.

name: Grilled Lamball
description:
Marinated mutton slow-cooked over a grill.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

name: Stewed Galeclaw
description:
Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors.
Eating it will make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

name: Rushoar Bacon 'n' Eggs
description:
The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly
with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors.
Eating it will increase COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by +10% for a period of time.

name: Reindrix Stew
description:
Stewed vegetables and venison that was reared in a frigid environment.
The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness.
Eating it will stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

name: Fried Chikipi
description:
Magnificently juicy poultry.
Eating it will slightly increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

name: Rushoar Hot Dog
description:
Thick sausage wedged between warm buns.
The crisply seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for.
Eating it will increase COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by +20% for a period of time.

name: Eikthyrdeer Loco Moco
description:
Thick hamburger steak accented with a creamy fried egg.
This sublime combination brings pure joy to the mouths of those who eat it.
Eating it will increase COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by +20% for a period of time.

name: Eikthyrdeer Stew
description:
A tender, melt-in-your-mouth venison stew crafted with love.
The intertwining flavors of vegetables and meat create a harmonious blend that brings out a comforting richness.
Eating it will increase COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by +20% for a period of time.

name: Mozzarina Hamburger
description:
The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweetness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece.
Eating it will increase work speed
and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

name: Mozzarina Cheeseburger
description:
Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine.
Eating it will increase COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by +20%
and stay full longer for a period of time.

name: Fried Kelpsea
description:
Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness.
Eating it will increase COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by +10%
and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

name: Dumud Chowder
description:
Dumud lavishly covered in a thick, creamy soup.
Eating it will increase work speed
and stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

name: Gatling Gun
description:
A Gatling Gun capable of rapid fire. 
Mows down enemies with suppressive fire.

description: Floral cap shaped like a LilyQueen.

description: Hat shaped like a Whitemoth.

description: Hood shaped like a Lizardman.

description: Cap shaped like a NegativeOctopus.

description: Headband shaped like a PinkRabbit.

description: Helm shaped like a SheepBall.

name: Dumud Helm
description: Helm shaped like a LazyCatfish.

name: Swee Cap
description: Cap shaped like a MopBaby.

description: Hat shaped like a RaijinDaughter.

name: Cattiva Hat
description: Hat shaped like a PinkCat.

name: Summoning Altar
description:
Slab depicting NightLady.
Offer to a Altar
to summon a powerful Pal.

name: Bellanoir's Slab
description:
Slab depicting NightLady. 
Offer to a Altar 
to summon a powerful Lv 30 NightLady.

name: Bellanoir Libero's Slab
description:
Slab depicting NightLady_Dark.
Offer to a Altar
to summon an exceptionally powerful Lv 50 NightLady_Dark.

name: Bellanoir's Slab Fragment
description:
Fragment depicting NightLady.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

name: Bellanoir Libero's Slab Fragment
description:
Fragment depicting NightLady_Dark.
Combine all of them to create a Slab.

name: Ancient Civilization Core
description:
Core from technology that was lost long ago.
Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

name: Ring of Mercy
description:
Pacifist's ring.
The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

name: Low Quality Recovery Meds
description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Low quality, but restores some Health.

name: Recovery Meds
description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
Restores a decent amount of Health.

name: High Quality Recovery Meds
description:
Medicine that heals wounds over time.
High quality; restores a lot of Health.

name: Cavern Mushroom
description:
Mushroom that grows prolifically in caves.
Can be made into healing medicine.

name: Ability Glasses
description:
Glasses used to discern hidden Pal abilities.
Displays Health, Attack and Defense stats on a scale of 0 to 100.

name: Vital Remedy
description:
Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Health by a slight amount when consumed.
Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Stamina Remedy
description:
Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Stamina by a slight amount when consumed.
Ineffective when used by Pals.

name: Might Remedy
description:

description:

Missiles explode upon impact, causing damage over a wide area.

description:

It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while.
As a result of further experiments, ultimate quality has been achieved.

Cannot be used in dungeons and other similar locations.

name: Potato
description:

Not suitable for raw consumption.

name: Carrot

A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable. 
Not suitable for raw consumption.

name: Onion
description:
A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history. 
Not suitable for eating raw.

name: Rushoar Gyoza
description:
A dish made by wrapping a filling of mushrooms and meat in wheat flour and boiling it. The chewy texture is irresistible. 
Eating it improves your COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by 10% for a period of time.

name: Stir-Fried Vegetables
description:
A dish made by stir-frying Carrot and Onion. 
A simple and delicious way to enjoy vegetables. Eating it will slightly increase your work speed and improve your COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by 10% for a period of time.

name: French Fries
description:
A dish made by deep-frying Potato. 
Once you start eating, you can't stop. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

name: Broncherry Fried Noodles
description:
A dish made by stir-frying noodles with vegetables and meat. 
The rich seasoning pairs perfectly with the thick cuts of meat. Eating it will increase your COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_Attack by 20% for a period of time.

name: Spring Rolls
description:
A dish made by wrapping vegetables and mushrooms in a thin skin and deep-frying them. 
The crispy texture is delightful. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease and increase your COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by 10% for a period of time.

name: Gratin
description:
A dish made by coating potatoes with sauce and baking them to perfection. 
Best enjoyed hot and fresh. Eating it will provide lasting fullness and increase your COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by 10% for a period of time.

name: Minestrone
description:
A soup simmered with a variety of vegetables. 
Drinking it warms you to the core. Eating it will increase your work speed for a period of time.

name: Mammorest Curry
description:
A dish made by simmering vegetables and meat with spices. 
The rich flavor is highlighted by large chunks of tender meat. Eating it will increase your COMMON_STATUS_RANGE_ATTACK by 25% for a period of time.

name: Galeclaw Nikujaga
description:
A dish made by simmering meat and potatoes in a sweet and savory sauce. 
It has a mysteriously nostalgic taste. Eating it will increase your COMMON_STATUS_DEFENCE by 25% for a period of time.

name: Mushroom Quiche
description:
A dish made by baking a pastry crust filled with eggs, vegetables, mushrooms, and cream. 
It’s delicious even when cooled. Eating it will help you stay fuller for a while and make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.
